articles.headline: Uruguay out of World Cup after keeper blunder against Spain
articles.description: Uruguay pulled goalkeeper Fernando Muslera at halftime of their FIFA World Cup group-stage final after his blunder in the first half gifted Spain the lead at Estadio Akron on Friday.

articles.headline: Lionel Messi to start on bench for Argentina group finale
articles.description: Lionel Messi will start Argentina's final group stage match against Jordan on Saturday from the substitutes' bench, coach Lionel Scaloni said.
